entry.title: Experimenting while 140 BPM
entry.summary: Wrong expectations Running is perhaps the most ancient activity, yet the question remains: why the hell do we do it? Everyone has their reasons. After so many years I am (finaly) starting to find mine. I started to run so many times. And was always failing. Until recently. Hollywood (and co) for decades were showing us a picture, where people (almost) always runs with the music: So I was ...

entry.title: Missing Meet Extension
entry.summary: Traditions first For the last 5 years, I have worked primarily remotely. For the last 3 (almost there), I’ve been working at Contentsquare with headquarters in Paris. There are some coworkers in Berlin, but my main team fellows work from different cities: Paris, Lyon, Nice, Orléans, and Pula. It happens that a few times per year, we meet for an offsite together — a company event for the whole...

entry.title: Dart, Flutter, and the Case of the Missing Version Number

link.title: Dart, Flutter, and the Case of the Missing Version Number

entry.summary: The SDK Shift Or what happens when you stop painting screens and start wiring them under the hood After many years as a mobile developer, switching to work on a mobile SDK has been… an interesting ride. At first, it feels like I’ve crossed into backend territory — but truth be told, it’s still very much the same playground. What do I mean? Well, when you’re building a mobile app, chances are y...
